tools.name: get_this_week
tools.title: Get this week's AI governance briefing
tools.description: Return this week's curated AI governance stories from Responsible AI Pulse, ranked by significance. Each story includes headline, source, date, region, country, topic tag, one-sentence enterprise implication, and source URL, along with a short synthesis intro.

tools.name: get_radar
tools.title: Get the AI governance radar
tools.description: Return the Responsible AI Pulse radar: upcoming and recent AI governance milestones (regulations, deadlines, obligations) with date, jurisdiction, title, description, enterprise implication, and status.

tools.name: get_reads
tools.title: Get the Read of the Week list
tools.description: Return the Responsible AI Pulse Read of the Week list: curated papers, books, and podcast episodes on responsible AI, each with title, author or show, year, digest, why-it-matters tag, and link.
